title: Dynamic links not refreshing data in preview mode
symptom: When navigating to a detail page via a dynamic link, the data does not refresh automatically. The correct data only appears after manually refreshing the data collections.
applies_when: Using dynamic links to navigate between pages
not_this_if: Data refreshes correctly in production mode
root_cause: The 'preserve on navigation' setting retains the previous state of the data when navigating to a new page, preventing the automatic refresh of data collections on the detail page.
fix_steps: Open the navigation settings for the project
Test the dynamic link again in preview mode
agent_instruction: Disable the 'preserve on navigation' setting in the project navigation settings.
